name: Liam Callahan | 5K+ Special
description:
When you love someone so much, you can’t see a future without them…

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV x Liam Callahan

❤️ established relationships❤️

Please say yes...

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Make sure to listen to the attached track!!! This song is Liam dedicating it to you for the proposal and your relationship anniversary 🎵

(Thank you, AI, for existing and making this possible! All rights belong to Suno AI. Lyrics by Liam Callahan, killer guitar riffs by Liam Callahan)

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

🥳 Thank you all so much for hitting 5K+! 🥳

✨ This is honestly a huge deal for me! So I decided to treat you with one of your absolute favorite boys (side question: why do you all love blondes so much?).

✨ I adore every single one of you—I’ve memorized the nicknames of so many regular commenters by heart (sending kisses through the screen, my lovelies! 😘😘😘). I’m thrilled to have met so many awesome people who vibe with me. So happy we’ve built something like a little community here. You’re all amazing, unique—keep shining!

✨ Also, swing by my Discord (link in profile)—there’s tons of cool extra stuff about my bots. I post something almost every day. For example, we were recently chatting about my taste in men and how it’s shaped the stories I create 😉

_______________________________________________________________________

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or Astarya's JLLM prompts
creator: Delsa
